text: Expense ratio is 0.62%. Exit load policy: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 30 days. Minimum SIP investment is ₹100. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹500. Taxation: Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.
